title: Delicate Indian Doughnuts
description: A classic Indian dessert, gulab jamun, reimagined as delicate doughnuts. These sweet treats are deep-fried and soaked in a fragrant syrup.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, leavening agent, and sugar.
2. Gradually add milk to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
3. Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
4. Using a piping bag or a spoon, drop the batter into the oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
5. Fry the doughnuts until they are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
6. Using a slotted spoon, remove the doughnuts from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
7. Drizzle the gulab syrup over the warm doughnuts.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature.
